site.title: Taberna
site.description: A simple, customizable foundation for personal websites, portfolios, landing pages, and small institutional sites.

sections.title: A place where your ideas can find a home
sections.subtitle: Simple content, thoughtful presentation, and the freedom to make it your own

sections.title: Made to welcome different stories
sections.subtitle: A neutral foundation shaped by the identity of the person using it
content: Like a good tavern, this project was designed to welcome different people, ideas, and stories.
You bring the message and identity; Taberna provides an organized, responsive foundation ready to customize.

sections.title: Everything you need to get started
sections.subtitle: Content that is easy to organize and a foundation ready to publish

sections.title: What can find a place here
sections.subtitle: One foundation, many ways to tell a story
